content: figure   img alt  A photo of AirPods  data-caption  The AirPods 4 are the best entry-level AirPods yet.   Photo by Chris Welch   The Verge  data-portal-copyright  Photo by Chris Welch   The Verge  data-has-syndication-rights  1  src    strip all crop 0,0,100,100      figcaption  The AirPods 4 are the best entry-level AirPods yet.   Photo by Chris Welch   The Verge   figcaption    figure   p class  has-text-align-none  It s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new  a href    phone  a , its  strong entry-level AirPods 4   strong are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple s AirPods 4 starting at just  89   30 off  at  a href    The model with active noise-cancellation are also down to their second best price to date, going for  119   60 off  at  a href    psc 1  Amazon  a  and  a href     div class  product-block   h3 AirPods 4  h3   figure class  product-image   img width  300  height  200  src    class  attachment-medium size-medium  alt        figure   h3 Where to Buy   h3  ul  li  a href     strike  129  strike   89 at  strong Walmart  strong   a   li  li  a href     strike  179  strike   119 at  strong Amazon  with ANC   strong   a   li  li  a href     strike  179  strike   119 at  strong Walmart  with ANC   strong   a   li   ul   div   p class  has-text-align-none  The AirPods 4 are the best and most comfortable entry-level earbuds from Apple yet. They deliver fuller bass along with clearer, more detailed sound than previous models, and even now match the AirPods Pro in terms of voice call quality. They also boast an upgraded IP54 rating for water and dust resistance, meaning they can withstand light rain and sweaty workouts. As with other Apple headphones, they also play nicely with Apple devices, offering conveniences like automatic switching, access to hands-free Siri, and Apple TV support.  p   p class  has-text-align-none  If you re willing to spend  30 extra, the ANC model offers all the same features while also doing a surprisingly good job of tuning out the world. They can t rival the  a href    Pro  a , but they still dramatically cut down on ambient and low-frequency noise on planes and in offices, particularly with music playing. The ANC earbuds also offer a transparency mode that sounds natural, along with support for tracking via Apple s Find My App, a wireless charging case, and live translation a href    through an iOS 26 update  a .  p
